episode_title: KT #755 - DR PHIL (ADAM RAY) + SAL VULCANO, + GREG FITZSIMMONS

1.premise: Self-driving cars existing in Austin is widely understood as possible because Black communities aren't present to reject bad ideas first but rarely said directly.

2.premise: Waymos remove the human factor that protects drunk passengers from police.

1.premise: A Waymo can't wake you up, so "who wakes you" implies a helpful driver but reveals it's the police.

2.premise: A mother's phone call could be reframed as the most reliable alarm a heavy sleeper has.

3.premise: Cleaning during a sibling's punishment is widely understood as the survival move that deflects your own beating but rarely explained as strategy.

lines.text: -Uh, I hate Waymos.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: [ Cheers and applause ]
lines.label: fluff

lines.text: And I think -- On the reason that we got
lines.label: setup

lines.text: these little self-driving-ass cars in Austin
lines.label: setup

lines.text: is 'cause there's not enough black people to go,
lines.label: setup

lines.text: "Uh-uh."
lines.label: punchline

lines.text: [ Laughter ]
lines.label: fluff

lines.text: I hate these little self-driving-ass cars
lines.label: setup

lines.text: 'cause they don't -- they don't leave the human factor in there.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: 'Cause if I'm drunk and I'm going home,
lines.label: setup

lines.text: who's gonna wake me up in a Waymo?
lines.label: setup

lines.text: When you get drunk and you get into an Uber,
lines.label: setup

lines.text: the Uber driver wake you up and they so--
lines.label: setup

lines.text: "Hey, sir.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: You're at your house."
lines.label: setup

lines.text: You know who wakes you up in a Waymo?
lines.label: setup

lines.text: The Tempe Police in Phoenix, Arizona.
lines.label: punchline

lines.text: That's where I went to sleep in a waymo.
lines.label: tag

lines.text: And these niggas weren't nice or kind at all.
lines.label: tag

lines.text: [ Laughter ]
lines.label: fluff

lines.text: Take it from one example.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: One time -- 'Cause I'm a heavy sleeper.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: That's why they was mad at me about waking me up in a waymo.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: They couldn't wake me up for 30 minutes.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: [ Laughter ]
lines.label: fluff

lines.text: One lady one time tried to wake me up.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: She couldn't wake me up.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: She couldn't wake me up.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: She took my phone, unlocked it with my face,
lines.label: setup

lines.text: and then called my mama.
lines.label: punchline

lines.text: Nigga, I was up.
lines.label: tag

lines.text: Damn, you're Christian out of the play, nigga.
lines.label: tag

lines.text: I woke up immediately.
lines.label: tag

lines.text: And I was like, I'm so sorry.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: I started cleaning, 'cause, like,
lines.label: setup

lines.text: 'cause when I was a kid...
lines.label: setup

lines.text: When I was a kid, if your mama started whooping your siblings,
lines.label: setup

lines.text: if you cleaning, she not gonna whoop your ass, too.
lines.label: punchline

lines.text: And so I woke up, just started doing push-ups, cleaning,
lines.label: tag

lines.text: and then she was like,
lines.label: tag

lines.text: "How dare you let that lady get it every minute?"
lines.label: tag

lines.text: And the next day, I had to go to that same Uber lady place
lines.label: tag

lines.text: and then cut her grass and then wash her car.
lines.label: tag

lines.text: That's my time. Thank you all so much.
lines.label: fluff
